farinheira-and-apple-pillows-teleculinar.name: Farinheira And Apple Pillows
instructions: Peel the apples, cut them in cubes, put them in a frying pan, add the olive oil, sprinkle with sugar and light them on fire. Cook until the apple softens a little.
Add the brain of the undone farinheira, add the water and let it know. Finish the chopped parsley, wrap it up and book it.
Corte a massa folhada em duas partes, no sentido horizontal. Espalhe metade do recheio no centro de cada tira e dobre-as, pressionando as extremidades com um garfo para fecharem bem.

Cut the strips into small cushions, again pressing the ends of each with the fork. Have it on a tray, lined with vegetable paper, brush with the egg beaten and take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 20 minutes or until golden.

farro-with-wild-mushrooms.name: Farro With Wild Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place porcini mushrooms in a bowl and cover with warm water; soak until mushrooms are reconstituted, 20 to 30 minutes. Drain and chop mushrooms.

Heat olive oil in a pot over medium-high heat. Add cremini mushrooms and 1 pinch salt; sauté until slightly golden and moisture cooks off, 5 to 10 minutes. Add chopped porcini mushrooms, reduce heat to medium; cook and stir until hot, 2 to 4 minutes.
Add onion; cook and stir until translucent and golden, 5 to 7 minutes. Add garlic; cook and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Stir in farro until coated in olive oil. Increase heat to high; add 1 cup chicken broth and 1 pinch salt. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover the pot with a lid, and simmer, stirring once, until liquid is absorbed, about 10 minutes.

Increase heat to high; stir in remaining 2 cups chicken broth. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, cover the pot with a lid, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until farro starts to get tender, about 15 minutes. Remove the lid; simmer, uncovered, until farro reaches desired tenderness, about 15 minutes more.
Reduce heat to low; stir in crème fraîche and parsley. Season with salt and black pepper. Stir in Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese; serve.

fennel-potlikker.name: Fennel Potlikker

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Heat oil in a large pot over medium. Add onion, fennel, celery, and salt; cook, stirring often, until vegetables are translucent, about 4 minutes. Add Pernod and red pepper flakes; cook, stirring, until Pernod is evaporated, about 1 minute. Pour in 5 cups water and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook 45 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium heatproof bowl; discard solids.
Do Ahead: Potlikker can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool. Transfer to an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.

filipino-lechon-kawali.name: Filipino Lechon Kawali
instructions: Combine pork belly, garlic, bay leaves, salt, and pepper in a skillet; pour in enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until skin is tender, 35 to 45 minutes.
Drain and let sit at room temperature until pork has air-dried.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Fry pork in the hot oil, working in batches, until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.
Remove fried pork with a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.

fish-meatballs-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Fish Meatballs - Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 lata pequena de tomate pelado em cubos

instructions: Prepare the meatballs: clean the fish of skin and spines and crush it in a chipper. Lay in a bowl and add the previously chopped onion and garlic. Add the egg, grated bread and parsley, season with salt and pepper and knead until it is well connected. Mold small balls with this prepared and book.
Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite. Junte o tomate pelado e deixe cozinhar, envolvendo. Quando o tomate estiver macio, tempere com sal e pimenta e mexa.
Add the meatballs to the sauce, wrap carefully, cover and let cook. In the end, add the basil, cut into pieces, and serve with accompaniment to taste.

five-spice-pumpkin-soup.name: Five-spice Pumpkin Soup

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cook pancetta in olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-heat until crispy, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.

Add onion and celery to the pan drippings and saute until translucent, 5 to 7 minutes. Add garlic and bay leaves and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute, stirring constantly to keep the garlic from burning. Add chicken stock, pumpkin puree, apple cider vinegar, and thyme sprigs; bring to a boil.

Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 to 30 minutes (or up to 2 hours). Remove and discard thyme sprigs and bay leaves. Puree soup with an immersion blender until smooth or blend in batches in a blender.
Add five-spice, nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Whisk in cream and serve immediately.

flaky-cod-with-celery-salad.name: Flaky Cod With Celery Salad

ingredients.prep: boneless firm whitefish fillets (such as cod, pollock, or halibut)
thinly sliced crosswise, plus 1 cup celery leaves, torn if large

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Rub fish with oil on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Bake fish until flesh is opaque and begins to flake, 12–16 minutes.

Meanwhile, melt ghee in a small skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and mustard seeds and cook, shaking pan occasionally, until garlic is just beginning to turn golden and seeds begin to make a popping noise, about 4 minutes. Stir in ginger and curry powder and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 20 seconds. Remove from heat; season lightly with salt.
Toss celery, celery leaves, and onion in a small bowl. Finely grate zest and squeeze in juice from lemon into bowl; season with a pinch of salt. Toss to combine.
Divide fish between plates. Spoon garlic curry over. Top with celery salad.

flounder-on-a-skewer-lezzet.name: Flounder On A Skewer
instructions: 1. Clean and make a fill.
2. Prepare parts to wrap bottles.

3. 1 piece of large shrimp according to the size of the shrimp for each piece of lingu fish, if the small 2 pcs are laid, and the yellowis hDomate shells in the form of rolls are divided in the dör without peeling.
4. Sivri peppers are also split in the dör.
5. Pepper, tomato, lemon, pineapple and piece of rice respectively bottle index.
6. Use 4 rolls of lingu fish for a bulking.
7. Transfer sunflower oil to the service plate and add salt.
8. Oil all parts of bottle-mounted materials.
9. Place the grill and cook both sides well.
10. If you wish, you can try the recipe of lingu in the pan instead of swelling.

french-onion-soup-slow-cooker.name: French Onion Soup (slow Cooker)
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onions in melted butter until clear and browned, 10 to 15 minutes; transfer to a slow cooker. Add beef broth, garlic, salt, and black pepper to the slow cooker.
Cook on High for 4 hours or on Low for 8 hours.

fresh-broad-beans-with-olive-oil-lezzet.name: Fresh Broad Beans With Olive Oil
instructions: 1. Wash and remove the eyes thoroughly and cut on the desired length and leave them in the water with lemon.
2. After soaking up pink in the onion olive oil, add and mix the yellowms.
3. Add drain and sprinkle your car.
4. Then start cooking in jealous fire by adding hot water with tomatoes.
5. Add salt, powder sugar and lemon juice and cook until they soften.
6. Then get from the stove and cool the cover from the moment.
7. After cooling, transfer to the service plate and serve by spreading the dereot on the car.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

fresh-spiced-peach-jam.name: Fresh Spiced Peach Jam
instructions: Immerse the canning jars in simmering water until jam is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.
Mix together peaches, sugar, lemon juice, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice in a large pot. Bring to a boil; cook, stirring occasionally, until peaches are soft, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat.
Mash peaches with an immersion blender or potato masher to desired size and texture. Return the pot to heat; continue cooking jam until thickened, about 10 minutes more.
Pack jam into hot jars, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top. Wipe the rims with a clean, damp cloth. Top with the lids and screw on the rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower in jars using a holder, placing them 2 inches apart. Pour in more boiling water to cover the jars by at least 1 inch. Bring water to a rolling boil, cover the pot, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart, until cool, about 12 hours. Press the top of each lid with a finger, ensuring that the lid does not move up or down and seal is tight. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

fried-caper-and-artichoke-toasts.name: Fried Caper And Artichoke Toasts

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
preferably grilled,
drained, reserving 1 Tbsp. marinade

ingredients.item: Red radishes or 1 small watermelon radish
Coarsely chopped mixed tender herbs (such as basil

instructions: Combine zest of 1 lemon, 1 cup whole-milk ricotta, 2 tsp. honey, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a food processor; season with freshly ground pepper. Process until ricotta is fluffy and mixture is smooth, about 2 minutes. Set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium. Cook 2 thick-cut slices sourdough bread, cut in half crosswise, until golden brown and crisp underneath, about 4 minutes. Transfer bread to plates and turn fried side up. Repeat with another 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil and remaining 2 thick-cut slices sourdough bread, cut in half crosswise. Wipe out skillet.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in same skillet. Cook one 12-oz. jar marinated artichoke hearts, preferably grilled, drained, and one 2-oz. jar capers, drained, stirring occasionally, until artichokes are dark brown in spots, capers are darkened in color, and skillet looks dry, 5–8 minutes.

Meanwhile, combine 3 red radishes or 1 small watermelon radish, trimmed, thinly sliced, and 2 cups coarsely chopped mixed tender herbs (such as basil, chives, dill, and/or mint) in a small bowl. Add 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice and reserved 1 Tbsp. artichoke marinade and 2 tsp. caper brine; toss to coat.

Mound reserved whipped ricotta on toasts. Top with artichoke mixture, then herb salad. Season with pepper.
Do ahead: Whipped ricotta can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

fried-spare-ribs-with-alentejo-style-mig.name: Fried Spare Ribs With Alentejo-style Migas
fried-spare-ribs-with-alentejo-style-mig.original_name: Entrecosto frito com migas à alentejana
instructions: In a bowl, mix the pepper dough with a little salt and crushed garlic. Bar the ribs with this paste and let marinate, for about 4 hours or from one day to the next.
After the time indicated, put the lard in a pot, let it heat and fry the sausage, previously cut into slices. Remove and reserve.
In the same pot, throw the cut ribs, along with the marinade, and let it fry, until the meat is well cooked. Remove and reserve.

In a non-stick frying pan, pour the fat into which you fried the meat. Add the sliced bread and a little water and stir very well, until it falls apart and gets a thick consistency prepared. Let the migas fry on both sides to gain a golden crust, and transfer to a platter. Have the ribs and sausage on the migas and serve immediately.

fruit-salad-ingredients-and-preparation-.name: Fruit Salad Ingredients And Preparation
fruit-salad-ingredients-and-preparation-.original_name: Ensalada de frutas ingredientes y preparación
instructions: Cut all fruit into cubes with a diameter of 1 cm or more, for strawberries, into sheets.
Expand the Orange juice and put it through a paddle. Mix everything well into a bowl.
If you think she needs a sweet touch, you can wear bee honey.
Serves in a glass package to look good:)

full-moon-cake.name: Full Moon Cake
instructions: Arrange a rack in center of oven; preheat to 325°. Cut a 9" circle of parchment to cover bottom of springform pan. Grease pan with butter, dust with ﬂour, and set parchment inside.
Sift sugar, baking powder, salt, and remaining 2½ cups flour into a medium bowl. Stir in lemon zest.
Whisk egg yolks and vanilla in a medium bowl. Add milk and whisk to combine, then add oil and whisk again to combine.
Pour yolk mixture into dry ingredients. Fold batter with a wooden spoon, scraping bottom and sides of bowl, until creamy, glossy, and fully combined (about 6–7 folds).

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat egg whites in a large bowl until soft peaks form. Add cream of tartar and continue to beat until stiff peaks form (do not overbeat; it will dry out the egg whites).
Using a large spatula, fold one-third of egg whites into batter to lighten. Fold in remaining egg whites in two additions until batter is bubbly, shiny, and loose.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake cake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 45–50 minutes.
Run a very sharp knife between edge of cake and pan. Let cool in pan until cool to the touch, about 1 hour.
Carefully remove adjustable body of springform pan and invert cake onto a platter. Peel off parchment. Serve plain or top with whipped cream or icing, if using.

tras-os-montes-folar-teleculinaria.name: Folaarbacks
instructions: Mix the flour with yeast, previously dissolved in a little warm milk. Make a hole in the center and gather one egg at a time, crushing and gradually adding water to facilitate the process. Add the lard, butter and olive oil, wrap well and let it leave for 45 minutes.
Cut all the meat into small pieces. Pinch the cilantros and join the meats.

Garnish a tray with lard, sprinkle with flour and place half the dough extended to cover the surface of the tray. Spread over all the meats evenly, and finish with the other part of the extended dough. Brush with yolk and light in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 25 minutes.
